feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" in Fiori APP.
entry.content:
I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.

In "Custom Fileds" under This Custom Field  in the "UIs and Reports" Tab I see a lot of apps where I can enable this it for example:

- Manage Sales Order 

- Manage Sales Order V2

- Manage Sales Contract 

But it does not show "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" 

how can I solve this issue as I want want to enable it in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" App?

entry.title: I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.
entry.content:
I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.

App ID: F5987

In "Custom Fileds" under This Custom Field  in the "UIs and Reports" Tab I see a lot of apps where I can enable this it for example:

- Manage Sales Order 

- Manage Sales Order V2

- Manage Sales Contract 

But it does not show "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" 

how can I solve this issue as I want want to enable it in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" App?

entry.title: Alternate weight unit in different countries
entry.content: Our company creates a global material master that can be procured and sold throughout the world. We check the weight of goods at receipt and goods issue. In the EU we want to check the weight in KG (which is our unit of weight) but in the US we need to check the weight in LB. Is it possible in the standard to display weights in an additional unit  of weight in MIGO and VL02N (and other transactions) for specific users or for a specific org unit? Please note, this is not a question about units of measure. We know how to buy, sell and store in different UoMs.

entry.title: How EDI orders like Amazon is triggering particular storage location like Amazon stor loc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a query on IDOC's coming from EDI. I am unsure like how orders from Amazon customers trigger only Amazon storage locations when there are multiple storage locations.

There has been no determination made for this storage location with the plant in the system, and I have also checked the customer tables in SM30, no determination as well.

I have requested a source file from the customer to check the segment, I am stuck here, as I don't find any field as lgort in it.

Please guide me 

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Risk class update in mass from BAPI or any other tool for BP transaction
entry.content: I need to update Risk class in mass under Credit Profile Tab in BP transaction. Do we have any BAPI or tool which can be helpful to update for BP customers.

entry.title: List of Materials That Have A Specific Distribution Channel
entry.content:
Hello all - can anyone tell me if there is a table or query that can be run to find a list of all our materials with a given Distribution Channel? I want to pull a list of all our material assigned to a specific Channel.

 

Thank you in advance for any feedback you might have.

entry.title: SAP SD Configuration in Pricing as per IATA Role
entry.content: How can we configure the below scenario in SAP Condition Type and Pricing

entry.title: ISSUE : BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE adding new item
entry.content:
I trying to add new batch split using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE ( T-code VL02N)
Its urgent . Please help me on this 

Getting this error : Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001 .


Here is my code :



Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: Instead of customer account, Expense GL should hit for Tax amount in FOC sales
entry.content:
Hi All

I have a below requirement.

We have a process which similar to FOC Sales.

Order-Delivery + Billing with net value 0 but Tax should be calculated on the Invoice but should not debit the customer account instead it should hit the some Expense GL account which company provide it. 

Since the product is sample customer will not pay but it is taxable and company should pay the tax to the Govt. Please let me know if you need any further details. by adding the R100 we are making the net value zero.

e.g. below 

 

I tried in Google to find out similar requirement post but did not find helpful solution to the above. Please share the link if the similar issue was discussed before in SCN.

 

Small edition to initial post. The accounting entry should be as below. Please let me if this can be achievable if yes, what setting needs to be done?

 

 

 

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Two Credit limit for one customer
entry.content:
Hi everyone , 

we have a business requirement , the client want to handle two credit limits for the same customer

First one is for fineshed goods , the 2nd one for packaging ( palettes) in same sales area , the order combine the two fineshed good + packaging , if any of those exceed the limits système should block

Ps : the fg and packaging have diff items category

Is there any solution to handle this requirement or any enhancement with user exit I just need your help if it’s possible to have a vision to what should we do and from where should i start

entry.title: Quantity Scales determination in the multi payee condition contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In case of Multi Payee Condition Contract (0S02), the requirement is to determine the scale for settlement condition type is based on the Total Business quantity for all the customers maintained in the Business volume criteria in the condition contract, however the settlement calculation will be done on the basis of individual customer business volume quantity.

In this case, only the scales need to be determined based on the total business volume quantity. It works for the total business volume (Amount) when we assign Routine 2 to RES1 condition type and RBVT condition type to the business volume criteria. However, it does not work in cases where the scales need to be determined based on the total quantity.

Please suggest.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Multiple Profit center issue in Delta accrual document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When we are performing Delta accruals against the condition contract for multiple profit centers, the Delta accruals document is not being posted to the accounts. An error message "GLT2201 - Balancing field Profit Center in line item not filled" is displayed. The settlement document is created correctly for the multiple profit centers and the invoices are also posted correctly for different profit centers. However, when we execute the Delta accruals document, the system is unable to post the document for the multiple profit centers. The Delta accruals work fine in the case of a single profit center.

Please advise.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
Hi, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
i, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Version 2 F3893 application
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

The create button givne in the new app F3893 for the version 2023 is not working. It is not giving any error but nothing happens when we click on the Create link.

Also when we select any record from the table and then click on Create, it is calling the CreatewithorderType after create it is giving error "Resource not found for segment 'com.sap.gateway.srvd.c_salesordermanage_sd.v0001.CreateWithSalesOrderType'"

Can any one help us here?

Thanks

Sarita

entry.title: is checking at line item level in S4HANA tcode VA05 is new feature?
entry.content:
is checking at line item level in S4HANA tcode VA05 is new feature?
appreciate if someone can guide me on which SAP notes / documentation that explains this improved features?
it wasnt the case in ECC.

p/s: i've tried scouring for SAP Notes but none relevant to what i am looking for

Thanks!
Azizul

entry.title: Single Invoice per Payer and different Sold to
entry.content:
Hi all,

My business requirement is to have the possibility to create a single invoice with the same Payer and different Sold-To party without an invoice list.

I need only the possibility, it means that when users required create a single invoice, is not a must.

Any idea?

Please suggest me any solutions!

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Data Migration Cockpit Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few custom fields for a customer's (Key User Extensibility Fields). We are in the stage of migrating their legacy system data into SAP.

There is a data migration template called (Source data for Customer - extend existing record by new org levels) where it has the custom fields I have created in the system. But whatever the value I put in the template and migration is also getting successful, but somehow couldn't see the value getting reflected on the customer master data records.

Please advise what could be wrong in here.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Please refer to the below screenshot

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Version 2 F3893 application
entry.content:
we have SAP S/4 HANA 2023 version, and in the new Manange Sales order V2 app, the create button link is not working.

Nothing happens when we click on it, nothing in the error log, no console or network error.

It is not calling any odata service.

Can anyone help us here ?

Thanks

entry.title: Sales order in progress should be close
entry.content:
Hi all

I have an issue with a sales order. In this order we have an item with 4 quantity but only 3 has been confirmed and delivered. The problem is that in the related production order we have 4 quantity which was delivered for this order. So now we have an open quantity of 1 for this sales order which we can retrieve in MD04. 

It is not possible to modify manually the quantity or set a rejection reason because of the production order which is close and not modifiable. It's also not possible to create a delivery for this item because there is no schedule line for it.

Does someone have a solution for this issue ? May set the status as completed but I didn't find a way to do so.

Thanks in advance.
